title: High-throughput miniaturized 16S rRNA amplicon library preparation
author: Jeremiah Minich
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.u2ieyce

steps.title: Resuspend lyophilized primers from 96-Well plates...
steps.instruction: Resuspend lyophilized primers from 96-Well plates shipped from Integrated DNA Technologies (IDT) at 3nmol per well using the following protocol 16S Illumina Primer Plate Resuspension (100 µM) by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Aliquot and mix forward (barcoded) and...
steps.instruction: Aliquot and mix forward (barcoded) and reverse primer pairs to working concentrations (5µM each) in 96-Well plates using the following protocol 16S Illumina Primer Plate Aliquoting (working plates 5µM Forw & Rev) by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Compress (4) 96-Well working primer plates...
steps.instruction: Compress (4) 96-Well working primer plates into (1) 384-Well echo compatible primer plate in a fully interweived layout using the following protocol Fully interweived layout is described in abstract of protocol 16S Illumina Primer Plate Compression by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Compress (4) 96-Well gDNA plates into...
steps.instruction: Compress (4) 96-Well gDNA plates into (1) 384-Well echo compatible gDNA plate in a fully interweived layout using the follwing protocol. Fully interweived layout is described in abstract of protocol Extracted gDNA Plate Compression by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Dispense PCR master mix into triplicate...
steps.instruction: Dispense PCR master mix into triplicate 384-Well plates using the following protocol. PCR Master Mix Aliquoting by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Execute sub-microliter dispenses using Echo 555...
steps.instruction: Execute sub-microliter dispenses using Echo 555 into triplicate 384-Well plates using the following protocol. Sub-microliter Primer and gDNA Dispense by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Pool PCR products from triplicate 384-Well...
steps.instruction: Pool PCR products from triplicate 384-Well plates using the following protocol 3X PCR Replicate Pooling by Rodolfo A Salido Benitez

steps.title: Seal plate with storage aluminum foil and store in freezer
steps.instruction: Seal plate with storage aluminum foil and store in freezer.

steps.title: Thermocycler conditions Primers
steps.instruction: Thermocycler conditions Primers: 16S V4 515F–806R Amplicon size: ~390 bp Cycle times are longer for 384-well thermocyclers. %s %s TemperatureTime, 96-wellTime, 384-wellRepeat94 °C3 min3 min 94 °C45 s60 sx3550 °C60 s60 sx3572 °C90 s105 sx3572 °C10 min10 min 4 °Choldhold
